description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set on a rectangular plot surrounded by dense coniferous and flowering trees. The house features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a clean, geometric design with white and gray exterior walls. The front of the house includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch and landscaped garden, while the rear opens to a patio area and a reflective water feature. The landscaping is meticulously arranged, with trees providing privacy and a natural boundary around the property. The house's architecture emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas. The overall aesthetic is sleek, minimalist, and contemporary.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist white and gray exterior, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped garden, and water feature, with the house framed by tall coniferous trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's geometric lines, large windows, and the dense tree line along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, extensive windows, and the privacy provided by the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio area, more landscaping, and the continuation of the modern architectural style.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and minimalist landscaping
